name: PhD Candidate
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. References to a sequencing-related study and a colleague named Kelly. Working on a project with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition in his career.
intermediate_belief: I must work harder to be successful.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't publish enough, I will not succeed.
coping_strategies: Working longer hours to match colleagues' productivity.
situation: Comparing themselves to colleagues who work longer hours and publish more papers.
auto_thought: I am not doing enough compared to others.
behavior: Spending excessive time working and feeling stressed.
